title: pappochroma bellidioides
intro: Pappochroma bellidioides, also known as the "false daisy," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pappochroma bellidioides has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
